channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🏛️ NATO Criticizes Russian and Chinese Nuclear Policies
item.description: NATO urged Russia and China to work with the United States on nuclear arms transparency and stability at an upcoming international conference, criticizing their current nuclear stances. (Source: Reuters)

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Overhauls Defense Export Rules, Opens Global Arms Market
item.description: Japan announced its biggest defense export rule changes in decades, scrapping restrictions on overseas arms sales and enabling exports of warships, missiles, and other weapons. (Source: Reuters)

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Trump China Policy Drifts as Tariffs Stall
item.description: President Trump's tariff strategy toward China has stalled, with trade policy lacking direction as the administration struggles to reset relations. (Source: Reuters)

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Seeks US Jet Fuel and SAF to Counter Iran War Strain
item.description: The European Commission announced guidance on airport slots, fuel supplies, and passenger rights as jet fuel shortages loom due to the Iran war. (Source: Reuters)

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Vance to Depart for Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan
item.description: Vice President JD Vance and top US officials are expected to travel to Islamabad for potential Iran peace negotiations as the ceasefire deadline approaches. (Source: CNN)

item.title: 🚢 US Navy Minesweepers Head Toward Middle East as Hormuz Clearance Operation Shapes Up
item.description: US Navy minesweepers are being deployed toward the Middle East as the Strait of Hormuz clearance operation takes shape. (Source: The War Zone)

item.title: 🇺🇦 Belarus Building Roads, Artillery Positions Near Ukraine Border
item.description: Zelensky warns Belarus is constructing roads and artillery positions near the Ukraine border. (Source: Kyiv Independent)

item.title: 🇺🇦 US Army Turns to Ukraine-Tested Drones to Counter Iranian UAV Threat
item.description: US Army adopts drone tactics from Ukraine battlefield to counter Iranian UAV threats. (Source: Defense News)

item.title: 🇺🇸 Pentagon Contracts GM, Ford, GE for Weapons Production
item.description: Pentagon contracts GM, Ford, GE for weapons production amid Iran war. (Source: The Independent)

item.title: 🇮🇩 Major Indonesian Natural Gas Find Announced
item.description: Indonesia announced a major natural gas discovery that could reshape regional energy dynamics. (Source: The Straits Times)

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria Opposition Leaders Charged With Treason
item.description: Nigeria charges opposition figures with treason and coup-related offenses. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🇿🇦 South Africa Police Commissioner Charged
item.description: South Africa charges police commissioner with corruption-related offenses. (Source: AP News)

item.title: ⛪ Trump Bible Reading Event With Evangelicals
item.description: President Trump participates in Bible reading event with conservative Christian leaders. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🇭🇺 EU Court Rules Hungary Breached Law on LGBTQ Rights
item.description: European Court rules Hungary violated EU law with its anti-LGBTQ legislation. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🇨🇳 Has China's Economy Just Shrugged Off Japanification?
item.description: Analysis examines whether China's economy has overcome Japan-style stagnation. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: 🇮🇷 China Deepens Iran Oil Ties as Hormuz Crisis Mounts
item.description: Xi Jinping deepens China-Iran oil ties as Hormuz crisis escalates. (Source: New York Times)

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Earthquake Triggers Tsunami Warning
item.description: Japan issues tsunami warning after significant earthquake strikes offshore. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🇭🇹 UN Authorizes Force to Combat Haiti Gang Violence
item.description: UN authorizes international force to suppress Haiti gang violence as situation deteriorates. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🍎 Apple CEO Change Announced
item.description: Apple announces Tim Cook stepping down as CEO, replaced by John Ternus. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🇮🇳 India-South Korea Trade and Defense Deals Signed
item.description: India and South Korea sign trade, shipbuilding, defense, and AI cooperation agreements. (Source: AP News)

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese Aircraft Carrier Transit Through Taiwan Strait
item.description: Chinese aircraft carrier transits Taiwan Strait amid regional tensions. (Source: Stars and Stripes)

item.title: 🛢️ Iran War Causes Biggest Energy Crisis in History
item.description: IEA says Iran war is creating the biggest energy crisis in history as oil markets remain on edge. (Source: The Star)

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Claims New Hypersonic Missile Deployment
item.description: Russia announces deployment of new hypersonic missile capabilities. (Source: TASS)

item.title: 🤖 Palantir Backlash Over AI-Driven Military Doctrine
item.description: Palantir faces backlash over AI-driven military doctrine implementation. (Source: Decrypt)

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Markets on Edge as Trump Signals No Ceasefire Extension
item.description: Trump signals no ceasefire extension without agreement, keeping oil markets on edge. (Source: OilPrice)
